candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
The transpiration rates of various plants are shown below.
How many liters of water per week are lost by a coconut palm?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
已知不同植物的蒸腾速率如下:

\begin{tabular}{ll}
植物种类 & 蒸腾速率 (升/周) \\
\hline
橡树 & 76.5 \\
玉米 & 16.9 \\
小麦 & 6.8 \\
椰子棕榈 & ? \\
\end{tabular}

根据上表信息,求椰子棕榈每周蒸腾而流失的水量 (单位: 升)。
metadata.explanation_zh: 你被要求计算每周而非每天损失的升数。给定信息是椰子树每天损失75升。要找出每周损失量,我们需要将每天损失量乘以一周的天数,即7天。因此,椰子树每周损失75升 $\times$ 7天 = 525升。

The transpiration rates of various plants are shown below.

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The image is readable enough to identify the coconut palm value as 75 liters per day. The question clearly asks for liters per week, so the expected answer is obtained by multiplying 75 by 7 to get 525.
